expectations.text: Warns about prefix-slug collision: IS rejects names sharing a prefix with an existing field
expectations.evidence: Slug Collision Risk section: "IS rejects names that share a prefix with existing custom fields." Gives example of referral_date / referral_source collision.

expectations.text: Mentions the stale UI error: the form holds the error from the previous attempt and reports the LAST collision, so refresh the page between adds
expectations.evidence: Gotcha #2 section: "InfluencerSoft holds stale validation errors in the UI and will report the WRONG collision field if you don't refresh." Path: Contacts → Custom Fields → Create field → Refresh the page when done.

expectations.text: References the existing custom-field naming convention: short distinct stems (sku_code, sku_label, bought_on, order_ref, xsell_name, xsell_url, pack_name)
expectations.evidence: Answer never references the existing project field stems (sku_code, sku_label, bought_on, order_ref, xsell_name, xsell_url, pack_name). Field Name Rules section only says to use snake_case and keep it short.

expectations.text: Gives the exact menu path: Contacts → Custom Fields
expectations.evidence: Multiple occurrences: "Path: Contacts → Custom Fields", Quick Checklist: "Check existing custom fields at Contacts → Custom Fields"

expectations.text: Recommends a shorter or differently-prefixed name (e.g., ref_src, source_ref) to reduce collision risk with future fields
expectations.evidence: Workaround offered is 'referral_traffic_source' (longer, not shorter) or 'follow stems in manual-setup-guide Part 2'. Neither ref_src nor source_ref nor any short alternative stem is suggested.
